name: Power-Up
description: Energizing power-up boosts with ascending sweep

prompts.SessionStart: bright ascending NES square wave arpeggio climbing three notes, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: descending square wave arpeggio falling three notes with clear resolution, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying NES square wave completion chime with bright ring, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick single square wave blip at mid pitch, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short confirming square wave chirp ascending one step, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two-note square wave question tone with rising interval, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady pulsing square wave with rhythmic repeating pattern, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: square wave tone splitting into two ascending parallel arpeggios, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear returning square wave ping descending one note, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic NES square wave burst ascending rapidly, 8-bit chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
